project.name: websocket-chat
project.description: 一个基于 WebSocket 的即时通讯与协作平台的桌面客户端，使用 Electron 将 Vue.js Web 应用打包为跨平台桌面应用程序。支持私聊群聊、AI助手、协作编辑、五子棋对弈、文件传输等功能。

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven 项目配置文件，定义了 websocket-chat 后端的依赖和构建配置。基于 Spring Boot 3.2.3，集成了 WebSocket、JPA、SQLite、Caffeine 缓存、Spring AI OpenAI、JWT 认证等核心依赖。
nodes.languageNotes: 使用 Spring AI BOM 管理 AI 相关依赖版本，SQLite 作为嵌入式数据库，Hibernate Community Dialects 提供 SQLite 方言支持。

nodes.name: ChatApplication.java
nodes.summary: Spring Boot 应用入口类，启用定时任务调度，启动时自动创建 data 目录，并注册 CommandLineRunner 记录所有已注册的 API 端点。

nodes.name: CacheConfig.java
nodes.summary: 缓存配置类，使用 Caffeine 实现本地缓存，最大容量 1000 条，写入后 5 分钟过期。

nodes.name: CorsConfig.java
nodes.summary: CORS 跨域配置类，注册全局 CorsFilter Bean，允许所有来源、请求头和请求方法，支持携带凭证，预检请求缓存 1 小时。

nodes.name: DatabaseMigration.java
nodes.summary: 数据库迁移组件，实现 ApplicationRunner 接口，在应用启动时检查并自动添加 users 表的 token_version 列，用于 JWT token 版本控制。

nodes.name: FileUploadConfig.java
nodes.summary: 文件上传配置类，继承 WebMvcConfigurationSupport，将 /files/** URL 路径映射到本地文件系统的 uploads 目录，自动创建上传目录。依赖 LocalProperties 获取路径配置。

nodes.name: OrphanFileCleaner.java
nodes.summary: 孤儿文件清理器，每小时清理 temp 目录中超过 1 小时的临时文件，每天凌晨 3 点扫描 uploads 目录，对比数据库 FileRecord 删除磁盘上无引用的孤儿文件。

nodes.name: SnowflakeConfig.java
nodes.summary: 雪花算法 ID 生成器配置类，从配置文件读取机器 ID，创建 SnowflakeIdGenerator Bean 用于分布式唯一 ID 生成。

nodes.name: WebMvcConfig.java
nodes.summary: Web MVC 配置类，注册 JWT 认证拦截器拦截 /api/** 路径，排除注册、登录、文件和发现接口，同时配置 /api/apps 端点的 CORS 策略。

nodes.name: WebSocketConfig.java
nodes.summary: WebSocket 配置类，注册三个 WebSocket 处理器端点：聊天(/ws/chat)、五子棋(/ws/gomoku)、协作编辑器(/ws/editor)，均使用 JWT 认证拦截器并允许所有来源。

nodes.name: application.properties
nodes.summary: Spring Boot 应用主配置文件，定义服务器端口(8081)、SQLite 数据库连接、文件上传限制(500MB)、JWT 密钥和过期时间、雪花算法机器 ID、Spring AI OpenAI 配置等。禁用了 OpenAI 自动配置。
nodes.languageNotes: 使用环境变量支持（如 ${JWT_SECRET:...}）实现配置外部化，SQLite 数据库路径为相对路径 ./data/chat.db。

nodes.name: apps.json
nodes.summary: 应用发现元数据文件，定义了平台支持的四个应用：五子棋对战、PLAY-CS 1.6、算法可视化器、协作编辑器。每个应用包含 ID、标题、URL、技术栈、使用场景等描述信息。

nodes.name: AiAssistant.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity representing an AI assistant configuration, storing model parameters (base URL, API key, model name, temperature, token limits), avatar settings, and sharing/public visibility flags.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses @JsonSerialize with ToStringSerializer for Long ID fields to avoid JavaScript precision loss.

nodes.name: AiAssistant
nodes.summary: JPA entity mapped to 'ai_assistants' table. Stores AI assistant configuration including owner, avatar, system prompt, LLM connection settings (baseUrl, apiKey, model), generation parameters (temperature, maxContext, maxTokens), and visibility flags (isSystem, isPublic, shareCode).

nodes.name: AiConversation.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity representing a conversation session between a user and an AI assistant, tracking title, summary, and message count.

nodes.name: AiConversation
nodes.summary: JPA entity mapped to 'ai_conversations' table. Links a user to an AI assistant with conversation metadata including title, summary, and message count.

nodes.name: AiMessage.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity representing a single message within an AI conversation, with role (user/assistant), content, and token count tracking.

nodes.name: AiMessage
nodes.summary: JPA entity mapped to 'ai_messages' table. Stores individual messages in an AI conversation with role (user/assistant/system), content, and token usage tracking.

nodes.name: FileRecord.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity for file storage records with content-hash-based deduplication (refCount) to avoid storing duplicate files.

nodes.name: FileRecord
nodes.summary: JPA entity mapped to 'file_records' table. Tracks uploaded files with content hash for deduplication, reference counting, and file metadata (URL, size, type).

nodes.name: GomokuRoom.java
nodes.summary: In-memory game room model for Gomoku (Five-in-a-Row) multiplayer games, managing board state, players, spectators, and game lifecycle.

nodes.name: GomokuRoom
nodes.summary: Plain Java class (not JPA entity) representing an in-memory Gomoku game room. Contains 15x15 board state, black/white players, spectator list, game status enum (WAITING/PLAYING/FINISHED), win detection, move history, and disconnect handling.

nodes.name: GomokuPlayer
nodes.summary: Inner static class representing a Gomoku game player with userId and username.

nodes.name: Mention.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity for @mention records in chat messages, supporting both individual user mentions and @all broadcasts.

nodes.name: Mention
nodes.summary: JPA entity mapped to 'mentions' table. Records @mention events in messages with support for both individual user mentions (mentionedUserId) and @all broadcasts (isAll flag). Indexed on messageId and (mentionedUserId, roomId).

nodes.name: MentionReadReceipt.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity tracking read receipts for @mention notifications, with unique constraint on (mentionId, userId).

nodes.name: MentionReadReceipt
nodes.summary: JPA entity mapped to 'mention_read_receipts' table. Tracks which users have read which @mention notifications, with a unique constraint preventing duplicate receipts per (mentionId, userId) pair.

nodes.name: Message.java
nodes.summary: Core JPA entity for chat messages supporting text, file, and system message types, with file attachment metadata and sequence numbering for ordering.

nodes.name: Message
nodes.summary: JPA entity mapped to 'messages' table. Core chat message model with UUID primary key, room/sender references, message type (text/file/system), sequence number for ordering, and optional file attachment fields (fileId, fileName, fileUrl, fileSize, fileType). Indexed on roomId, (roomId, seq), and senderId.

nodes.name: Room.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity representing a chat room with public/private type designation, owner reference, and optional avatar.

nodes.name: Room
nodes.summary: JPA entity mapped to 'rooms' table. Represents a chat room with name, type (public/private), owner ID, creation timestamp, and optional avatar URL. Indexed on owner_id.

nodes.name: RoomMember.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity with composite key representing room membership, tracking join time, read position, and member type.

nodes.name: RoomMember
nodes.summary: JPA entity mapped to 'room_members' table with composite key (RoomMemberId). Tracks room membership with join timestamp, last read sequence number for unread message tracking, and member type (user/bot). Indexed on roomId and userId.

nodes.name: RoomMemberId.java
nodes.summary: Composite primary key class for RoomMember entity, combining roomId and userId with proper equals/hashCode implementation.

nodes.name: RoomMemberId
nodes.summary: Serializable composite key class implementing equals() and hashCode() for the RoomMember entity's (roomId, userId) primary key.

nodes.name: User.java
nodes.summary: Core JPA entity for user accounts with authentication fields, avatar configuration, ban management, and token versioning for JWT invalidation.

nodes.name: User
nodes.summary: JPA entity mapped to 'users' table. Core user model with username, password, avatar settings (color/URL), timestamps (createdAt, lastSeen), ban management (banned, bannedAt, bannedReason), and JWT token version for session invalidation.

nodes.name: UserRemark.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity for user-to-user remark/nickname aliases, allowing users to set custom display names for other users.

nodes.name: UserRemark
nodes.summary: JPA entity mapped to 'user_remarks' table. Stores per-user custom nicknames for other users with unique constraint on (userId, targetUserId).

nodes.name: BusinessException.java
nodes.summary: Base runtime exception for business logic errors with an HTTP status code field, defaulting to 400 Bad Request.

nodes.name: BusinessException
nodes.summary: RuntimeException subclass carrying an HTTP status code (default 400). Serves as the base class for all business-domain exceptions in the application.

nodes.name: GlobalExceptionHandler.java
nodes.summary: Spring @RestControllerAdvice that catches and handles BusinessException, UserBannedException, ClientAbortException, and generic exceptions with structured JSON error responses.

nodes.name: GlobalExceptionHandler
nodes.summary: Spring @RestControllerAdvice providing centralized exception handling. Maps BusinessException to 400, UserBannedException to 403, silently handles ClientAbortException (client disconnect), and returns generic 500 for unhandled exceptions. Skips error responses for non-JSON content types.

nodes.name: UserBannedException.java
nodes.summary: Specialized exception thrown when a banned user attempts to access the system, with HTTP 403 status and optional ban reason.

nodes.name: UserBannedException
nodes.summary: Extends BusinessException with HTTP 403 status. Thrown when a banned user tries to perform actions, with support for an optional ban reason message.

nodes.name: FileUploadResponse.java
nodes.summary: Value object for file upload API responses, containing success status, file metadata (ID, name, size, URL, type), and error message.

nodes.name: FileUploadResponse
nodes.summary: Response DTO for file upload endpoints. Contains success flag, message, and file metadata (fileId, fileName, fileSize, fileUrl, fileType). Has both a no-arg constructor and a full-parameter constructor.

nodes.name: LogLineVO.java
nodes.summary: Lombok-based value object representing a single log line with line number, content, log level, and timestamp for admin log viewing.

nodes.name: LogLineVO
nodes.summary: Lombok @Data class representing a parsed log line with lineNumber, content, level (INFO/ERROR/WARN/DEBUG), and timestamp. Used for admin log viewing functionality.

nodes.name: MentionVO.java
nodes.summary: Value object for @mention data in API responses, combining mention metadata with sender name and message content.

nodes.name: MentionVO
nodes.summary: Response DTO for @mention data. Enriches Mention entity data with senderName and message content for client display. Supports both individual mentions and @all broadcasts.

nodes.name: SystemMetricsVO.java
nodes.summary: Lombok-based value object for system monitoring metrics including CPU usage, memory statistics, and uptime.

nodes.name: SystemMetricsVO
nodes.summary: Lombok @Data class representing system health metrics: CPU usage/cores, memory (total/used/free/usage%), uptime, and timestamp. Used for admin monitoring dashboard.

nodes.name: AiAssistantRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data JPA repository for AiAssistant entities, providing query methods for system assistants, public/system assistants, owner-based lookup, share code resolution, and owner+id composite lookup.

nodes.name: AiConversationRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data JPA repository for AiConversation entities, supporting conversation retrieval by user and assistant with ordering by update time, and conversation counting per user.

nodes.name: AiMessageRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data JPA repository for AiMessage entities, providing chronological message retrieval, recent message pagination via custom JPQL, message counting, and batch deletion by conversation ID.

nodes.name: FileRecordRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data JPA repository for FileRecord entities (String primary key), supporting content-hash-based and file-URL-based lookups for file deduplication.

nodes.name: MentionReadReceiptRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data JPA repository for MentionReadReceipt entities, tracking whether a user has read a specific mention with composite key lookup and existence check.

nodes.name: MentionRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data JPA repository for Mention entities (String primary key), with custom JPQL queries that join against MentionReadReceipt to find unread mentions and count them, plus message-based lookup.

nodes.name: MessageRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data JPA repository for Message entities (String primary key), providing extensive sequence-based queries for message retrieval after a given seq, latest messages with pagination, max seq lookup, and multi-room latest message batch retrieval.

nodes.name: RoomMemberRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data JPA repository for RoomMember entities with composite key (RoomMemberId), supporting member lookup by room, user, batch rooms, member type filtering, and room-based deletion.

nodes.name: RoomRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data JPA repository for Room entities, providing room lookup by member user via join query and private room discovery between two specific users using exists subqueries.

nodes.name: UserRemarkRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data JPA repository for UserRemark entities, supporting remark lookup by user+target composite key and listing all remarks for a given user.

nodes.name: UserRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data JPA repository for User entities, providing username-based lookup for authentication.

nodes.name: JwtUtil.java
nodes.summary: JWT utility component that generates and parses JSON Web Tokens using HMAC-SHA keys, embedding userId, username, and token version claims with configurable expiration (default 7 days).

nodes.name: LocalUploadUtil.java
nodes.summary: Local file upload utility implementing SHA-256 content-hash-based deduplication, with temp file staging, file moving between directories, deletion with legacy URL compatibility, and absolute URL construction for HTTP responses.

nodes.name: SnowflakeIdGenerator.java
nodes.summary: Distributed unique ID generator implementing the Snowflake algorithm with a custom 2024 epoch, 10-bit machine ID, and 12-bit sequence number, producing 64-bit sortable IDs.

nodes.name: LocalProperties.java
nodes.summary: Spring Boot configuration properties class binding the 'local' prefix, defining the local file storage path and web access URL prefix used by the file upload system.

nodes.name: JwtUtil
nodes.summary: Spring-managed JWT utility that generates tokens with userId/username/tokenVersion claims using HMAC-SHA signing, and parses tokens to extract claims. Configurable secret and expiration via application properties.

nodes.name: LocalUploadUtil
nodes.summary: File upload utility providing SHA-256 content-hash deduplication, temp-to-permanent file staging, deletion with legacy absolute URL normalization, and relative-to-absolute URL conversion for HTTP responses.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Lombok @Data, @Slf4j, @AllArgsConstructor for boilerplate reduction. Implements custom SHA-256 hashing for content-based file deduplication.

nodes.name: SnowflakeIdGenerator
nodes.summary: Distributed unique ID generator implementing Twitter's Snowflake algorithm with a custom 2024-01-01 epoch, 10-bit machine ID (up to 1024 machines), and 12-bit sequence number (4096 IDs per millisecond), producing time-sortable 64-bit IDs.
nodes.languageNotes: Synchronized nextId() method ensures thread safety. Uses bit-shifting for ID composition: (timestamp << 22) | (machineId << 12) | sequence.

nodes.name: AiController.java
nodes.summary: REST controller providing CRUD endpoints for AI assistants, including system and user-level assistant management, share code copying, and temperature configuration.

nodes.name: AppController.java
nodes.summary: REST controller that reads application configuration from classpath apps.json and returns the app list with auto-generated IDs and status fields.

nodes.name: AuthController.java
nodes.summary: REST controller handling desktop login authentication via username, generating JWT tokens with token version tracking for session invalidation.

nodes.name: AvatarController.java
nodes.summary: REST controller managing avatar uploads for users, chat rooms, and AI assistants using a two-phase temp-then-confirm pattern with room owner permission checks and WebSocket broadcast on user avatar changes.

nodes.name: FileController.java
nodes.summary: REST controller handling file uploads with comprehensive security validation including blocked extension filtering, 500MB size limit, folder detection, and reverse-proxy-aware URL resolution.

nodes.name: RoomController.java
nodes.summary: REST controller providing full chat room lifecycle management including creation, joining, leaving, member listing, message history retrieval, private room creation, member kicking, and room dissolution with owner-only authorization.

nodes.name: UserController.java
nodes.summary: Minimal REST controller exposing a single endpoint to retrieve the list of currently online users via the WebSocket handler.

nodes.name: UserRemarkController.java
nodes.summary: REST controller for managing user-defined nicknames/remarks for other users, supporting retrieval of remark maps and saving individual remarks.

nodes.name: JwtAuthInterceptor.java
nodes.summary: Spring HTTP interceptor that validates JWT Bearer tokens on every request, extracts user claims into request attributes, and blocks banned users with a 403 response including the ban reason.

nodes.name: WebSocketAuthInterceptor.java
nodes.summary: WebSocket handshake interceptor that extracts JWT token from the connection URI query parameter, validates it, checks for banned users, and stores userId/username/tokenVersion in WebSocket session attributes.

nodes.name: DiscoveryController.java
nodes.summary: REST controller exposing server discovery metadata (alias, port, protocol, version) and a health check endpoint that reports whether the multicast discovery service is running.

nodes.name: MulticastDiscoveryService.java
nodes.summary: Spring service implementing LAN server discovery via UDP multicast, broadcasting server info every 30 seconds and responding to client discovery requests with automatic restart on listener failures.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses java.net.MulticastSocket with ScheduledExecutorService for periodic broadcasts; implements a restart-with-backoff pattern in the listener thread with MAX_RESTARTS=5.

nodes.name: createAssistant
nodes.summary: POST endpoint that creates a new AI assistant for a user, mapping request body fields to AiAssistant entity properties including temperature with a 0.7f default.

nodes.name: updateAssistant
nodes.summary: PUT endpoint that updates an existing AI assistant by ID for a given user, mapping all configurable fields from the request body.

nodes.name: checkRoomOwnerPermission
nodes.summary: Authorization helper that verifies the requesting user is the room owner by parsing the JWT from the Authorization header and comparing against the room's ownerId; returns 401/403 error responses on failure or null on success.

nodes.name: uploadFile
nodes.summary: POST endpoint handling file upload with multi-layer validation: empty check, folder detection via path separators, 500MB size limit, dangerous extension blacklist, then delegates to FileUploadService with resolved server scheme/host/port.

nodes.name: resolveServerName
nodes.summary: Resolves the actual server hostname from X-Forwarded-Host or Host headers, handling IPv6 bracket notation and comma-separated proxy chains.

nodes.name: getUserRooms
nodes.summary: GET endpoint returning all rooms for a user, enriched with last message info and private room partner display names, converting Long IDs to String to avoid JavaScript precision loss.

nodes.name: kickMember
nodes.summary: POST endpoint that removes a member from a room, enforcing owner-only authorization and preventing self-kick, then notifies via WebSocket broadcast.

nodes.name: dissolveRoom
nodes.summary: POST endpoint that permanently deletes a room after verifying the requester is the room owner.

nodes.name: preHandle
nodes.summary: Interceptor entry point that extracts Bearer token from Authorization header, validates JWT, populates request attributes (userId, username, tokenVersion), and blocks banned users with a 403 JSON response.

nodes.name: beforeHandshake
nodes.summary: WebSocket handshake interceptor that extracts JWT from the URI query string, validates it, checks ban status, and stores userId/username/tokenVersion in session attributes for the WebSocket handler.

nodes.name: start
nodes.summary: PostConstruct lifecycle method that initializes the multicast socket, joins the multicast group on a suitable network interface, starts a daemon listener thread, and schedules periodic server info broadcasts every 30 seconds.

nodes.name: listen
nodes.summary: Daemon listener that receives UDP multicast packets, parses JSON discovery-request messages, and responds with server info directly to the sender, implementing automatic restart with a maximum of 5 retries.

nodes.name: broadcastServerInfo
nodes.summary: Periodically invoked method that serializes server metadata (alias, IP, port, protocol, user count, version) as JSON and sends it as a UDP multicast datagram to the configured group.

nodes.name: getLocalIp
nodes.summary: Enumerates network interfaces to find the first non-loopback IPv4 address, falling back to 127.0.0.1 if none found.

nodes.name: AiAssistantService.java
nodes.summary: AI助手的CRUD服务，支持系统级助手、用户自定义助手、公开助手的管理，以及通过分享码复制助手的功能。

nodes.name: AiChatService.java
nodes.summary: 核心AI聊天服务，支持流式对话、工具调用（web_search/web_fetch）、多模态附件、对话摘要压缩，兼容GLM和OpenAI两种API路径。

nodes.name: streamChat
nodes.summary: 带工具调用的流式聊天入口，根据baseUrl判断使用GLM还是OpenAI路径，注入工具可用性提示到系统消息。

nodes.name: toolCallingOpenAi
nodes.summary: OpenAI兼容的Agent循环实现，支持多轮工具调用（最多5轮），非流式检测tool_calls后执行工具并追加结果到消息历史。

nodes.name: toolCallingGlm
nodes.summary: GLM（智谱）专用的工具调用路径，使用内置web_search工具，支持DuckDuckGo降级搜索，搜索后流式生成最终回复。

nodes.name: streamGroupChat
nodes.summary: 群聊场景的流式AI调用，从群消息读取最近50条作为上下文，不写ai_messages表。

nodes.name: AiConversationService.java
nodes.summary: AI对话会话的CRUD服务，管理对话的创建、查询、标题更新、摘要更新、消息计数和级联删除。

nodes.name: AvatarService.java
nodes.summary: 头像上传管理服务，支持用户、AI助手、群聊三种实体的两阶段头像上传（临时上传+确认），包含文件校验和缓存清除。

nodes.name: EditorDocumentService.java
nodes.summary: 协作编辑器的文档房间管理服务，基于ConcurrentHashMap维护内存中的编辑房间状态，含定时清理闲置房间逻辑。

nodes.name: EditorRoom
nodes.summary: 编辑器房间内部数据类，包含文档ID、房间名、密码、创建者、活跃用户集合和活动时间戳。

nodes.name: FileUploadService.java
nodes.summary: 文件上传服务，基于SHA-256内容哈希实现文件去重，支持引用计数管理和文件信息查询。

nodes.name: GomokuGameService.java
nodes.summary: 五子棋游戏核心逻辑服务，管理游戏房间、玩家匹配、落子验证、胜负判定、断线重连、超时自动落子和观战功能。

nodes.name: GameRoom
nodes.summary: 五子棋房间内部数据类，维护棋盘状态、玩家信息、观战者列表、落子历史和断线状态。

nodes.name: MoveResult
nodes.summary: 落子结果数据类，封装落子有效性、胜负状态和获胜连线信息，使用静态工厂方法构造。

nodes.name: MentionService.java
nodes.summary: @提及服务，管理消息中的@提及创建、未读计数缓存、已读回执，以及从提及列表中提取AI助手成员。

nodes.name: MessageService.java
nodes.summary: 聊天消息服务，管理消息的发送（文本/文件）、序列号生成、历史查询、已读进度跟踪和发送者名称解析。

nodes.name: RoomService.java
nodes.summary: 聊天房间服务，管理公开/私聊房间的创建、成员加入/退出、AI助手房间成员管理，以及私聊显示名解析。

nodes.name: ToolCallingService.java
nodes.summary: 工具调用分发服务，统一管理web_search和web_fetch两个工具的定义和执行，供AI聊天使用。

nodes.name: UserRemarkService.java
nodes.summary: 用户备注服务，管理用户间自定义备注名的保存、查询和显示名解析，支持批量获取备注映射。

nodes.name: UserService.java
nodes.summary: 用户服务，提供桌面端登录（自动注册）、用户查询（带Spring Cache缓存）、Token版本管理和最后活跃时间更新。

nodes.name: WebFetchTool.java
nodes.summary: 网页内容抓取工具，使用Jsoup获取网页并提取正文内容（去除噪音标签），支持内容截断和错误处理。

nodes.name: WebSearchTool.java
nodes.summary: 网页搜索工具，通过DuckDuckGo HTML版搜索接口获取搜索结果，限制返回5条结果并截断过长内容。

nodes.name: ChatWebSocketHandler.java
nodes.summary: 主聊天WebSocket处理器，是整个系统的核心事件路由，处理用户加入、消息收发、房间管理、AI对话、@提及、智能体群聊回复等30+种事件类型。

nodes.name: handleAiChat
nodes.summary: 处理AI聊天WebSocket事件，自动创建会话、发送思考状态、流式转发token/工具调用/完成事件到前端。

nodes.name: triggerAssistantReply
nodes.summary: 触发群聊中AI助手的异步流式回复，通过占位消息+增量广播实现实时更新，含防抖和忙碌控制。

nodes.name: EditorWebSocketHandler.java
nodes.summary: 协作编辑器WebSocket处理器，管理编辑器大厅、文档房间的创建/加入/离开，以及Yjs协同编辑更新的转发。

nodes.name: GomokuWebSocketHandler.java
nodes.summary: 五子棋游戏WebSocket处理器，管理游戏大厅、房间创建/加入/观战、落子、认输、断线重连、重新开始等游戏事件。

nodes.name: handleTimeoutEvent
nodes.summary: Spring事件监听器，处理五子棋超时自动落子事件并广播给房间内所有玩家。

nodes.name: GroupAssistantExecutor.java
nodes.summary: 群聊AI助手的专用线程池执行器，配置4-8个守护线程和64容量队列，使用AbortPolicy拒绝策略。

nodes.name: GroupAssistantInvocationManager.java
nodes.summary: 群聊AI助手调用管理器，基于ConcurrentHashMap实现防抖（2秒）和并发控制（同一助手同一时间只允许一个调用）。

nodes.name: main.ts
nodes.summary: Vue 应用入口文件，初始化 Pinia 状态管理和路由，配置 Axios JWT 请求拦截器和 401/403 响应拦截器以处理认证和封禁逻辑。

nodes.name: App.vue
nodes.summary: Vue 根组件，渲染路由视图、全局 Toast 通知组件和关闭对话框组件，负责全局 UI 层的组合。

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Vue Router 路由配置，定义了服务器选择、登录、聊天、应用中心、五子棋、协作编辑器和 AI 助手等页面的懒加载路由，并设置页面标题映射。

nodes.name: style.css
nodes.summary: 全局样式文件，定义了黑白极简设计系统的 CSS 变量、自定义动画（消息气泡弹出、淡入、滑入）、滚动条美化、移动端响应式适配和 Element Plus 紫色主题覆盖。

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite 构建配置，启用 Vue 插件和 Element Plus 自动导入，配置 @ 路径别名，设置开发服务器代理将 API 和 WebSocket 请求转发到后端 8081 端口。

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript 编译器配置，目标 ES2020，启用严格模式和 bundler 模块解析，配置 @/* 路径别名指向 src 目录。

nodes.name: tsconfig.node.json
nodes.summary: Node 环境的 TypeScript 配置，用于 Vite 配置文件的编译，启用 composite 模式和 bundler 模块解析。

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: HTML 入口页面，设置中文语言、UTF-8 编码和视口元标签，挂载 Vue 应用的 #app 容器并加载 main.ts 模块。

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: 项目依赖和脚本配置，包含 Vue 3、Pinia、Element Plus、CodeMirror、Yjs 协作编辑等前端依赖，以及 Electron 桌面打包的开发依赖和构建脚本。

nodes.name: postcss.config.js
nodes.summary: PostCSS 配置文件，启用 Tailwind CSS 和 Autrefixer 插件。

nodes.name: tailwind.config.js
nodes.summary: Tailwind CSS 配置，启用 class 模式暗色主题，扫描 index.html 和 src 目录下的 Vue/JS/TS 文件。

nodes.name: electron-builder.yml
nodes.summary: Electron Builder 打包配置，指定应用 ID 和产品名称，将后端 JAR 作为额外资源打包，配置 Windows NSIS 安装程序支持自定义安装目录和桌面快捷方式。

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Electron 子目录的 package.json，指定使用 CommonJS 模块格式。

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: Electron 主进程的 TypeScript 配置，目标 ES2020，使用 Node16 模块解析，输出到 dist-electron 目录，启用严格模式和声明文件生成。

nodes.name: build.mjs
nodes.summary: Electron 构建脚本，使用 esbuild 将主进程 TypeScript 代码打包为单个 CJS 文件，将 preload 脚本单独转译，清理旧的构建输出。

nodes.name: main.ts
nodes.summary: Electron 主进程入口，初始化窗口和系统托盘，启动局域网服务发现，注册 IPC 处理器管理本地服务器启停、关闭行为配置和窗口操作。

nodes.name: preload.ts
nodes.summary: Electron preload 脚本，通过 contextBridge 安全地将 electronAPI 暴露给渲染进程，包括服务器发现、启停、窗口控制和关闭对话框等功能。

nodes.name: process-manager.ts
nodes.summary: 管理本地 Spring Boot 后端 JAR 进程的生命周期，负责启动/停止 Java 子进程，配置数据目录、SQLite 数据库路径和日志文件，带启动超时保护和优雅关闭机制。

nodes.name: window-manager.ts
nodes.summary: 管理 Electron 窗口和系统托盘的创建与行为，支持开发/生产模式加载不同 URL，实现关闭时最小化到托盘或退出的可配置行为，以及托盘右键菜单和双击恢复窗口。

nodes.name: discovery.ts
nodes.summary: 局域网服务发现模块，使用 UDP 多播（224.0.0.167:9999）监听并发现同一网络中的 WebSocket Chat 服务器实例，维护服务器列表并自动清理超时条目。

nodes.name: server-config.ts
nodes.summary: 动态服务器地址配置模块，提供 API URL、WebSocket URL 和文件 URL 的构建方法，支持 Web 模式（相对路径）和桌面模式（绝对路径）的双模切换，以及 Electron 环境检测。

nodes.name: avatar.ts
nodes.summary: 头像上传 API 客户端，支持用户头像、群聊头像和 AI 助手头像的两阶段上传流程（临时上传+确认），以及旧版直接上传接口，提供上传进度回调。

nodes.name: discovery.ts
nodes.summary: 渲染进程的服务发现 API 封装，通过 Electron preload 桥接调用主进程的局域网服务器发现和本地服务器启停功能，Web 环境下返回空结果。

nodes.name: file.ts
nodes.summary: 文件操作 API 客户端，提供文件上传（带进度回调）、文件信息查询功能，以及文件类型判断、大小格式化、图标映射和类型描述等丰富的文件处理工具函数。

nodes.name: userRemark.ts
nodes.summary: 用户备注 API 客户端，提供获取用户备注列表和保存/更新用户备注的接口，用于聊天中为联系人设置自定义备注名。

nodes.name: setServerBaseUrl
nodes.summary: 设置服务器基础 URL，去除尾部斜杠，用于切换 Web/桌面模式的 API 地址。

nodes.name: getApiUrl
nodes.summary: 获取完整的 API URL，Web 模式返回相对路径，桌面模式拼接服务器地址。

nodes.name: getWsUrl
nodes.summary: 获取完整的 WebSocket URL，自动处理 http->ws 协议转换和 Web/桌面双模式。

nodes.name: resolveUrl
nodes.summary: 解析资源 URL，对相对路径加上服务器地址，对 data:/http/blob URL 直接返回。

nodes.name: uploadFile
nodes.summary: 上传文件到服务器，支持 chatId 和 senderId 附加参数，提供上传进度回调。

nodes.name: getFileIcon
nodes.summary: 根据文件扩展名返回对应的 emoji 图标，覆盖图片、文档、表格、压缩包、音视频、代码等常见文件类型。

nodes.name: getFileTypeDescription
nodes.summary: 根据 MIME 类型或文件扩展名返回中文文件类型描述，带扩展名兜底逻辑。

nodes.name: startServer
nodes.summary: 启动本地 Spring Boot JAR 后端进程，创建数据目录，配置 SQLite 数据库和日志路径，通过监听 stdout 确认启动成功，带 30 秒超时保护。

nodes.name: stopServer
nodes.summary: 优雅停止后端 JAR 进程，先发 SIGTERM，5 秒后若未退出则强制 SIGKILL。

nodes.name: createWindow
nodes.summary: 创建 Electron 主窗口，配置尺寸限制和安全选项，根据环境加载开发服务器或生产文件，实现关闭时的行为控制（最小化到托盘/退出/弹窗询问）。

nodes.name: createTray
nodes.summary: 创建系统托盘图标，配置右键菜单（显示窗口/退出）和双击恢复窗口功能。

nodes.name: startDiscovery
nodes.summary: 启动 UDP 多播服务发现，加入多播组监听局域网内的服务器通告消息，解析 JSON 数据维护已发现服务器列表。

nodes.name: chat.ts
nodes.summary: Pinia store managing all chat-related state including messages, rooms, online users, read receipts, streaming AI responses, room assistants, and file attachments. Central data layer consumed by the WebSocket composable and chat UI components.

nodes.name: ai.ts
nodes.summary: Pinia store managing AI assistant state including assistants, conversations, messages, tool call tracking, and streaming responses. Provides the data layer for the AI chat feature alongside the chat store.

nodes.name: useWebSocket.ts
nodes.summary: Core WebSocket composable implementing a singleton connection manager for real-time chat. Handles connection lifecycle with exponential backoff reconnection, dispatches all chat events (messages, room management, user presence, file sharing, AI streaming, mentions, read receipts) to the chat and AI stores.

nodes.name: useEditorWebSocket.ts
nodes.summary: WebSocket composable for the collaborative code editor feature. Manages editor room creation/joining, Yjs CRDT document synchronization via binary WebSocket messages, participant tracking, and editor state lifecycle.

nodes.name: useGomokuWebSocket.ts
nodes.summary: WebSocket composable for the real-time Gomoku (five-in-a-row) game feature. Manages game room lifecycle, board state synchronization, player turns, spectator mode, chat within game rooms, and win detection display.

nodes.name: useToast.ts
nodes.summary: Lightweight toast notification composable providing a global show/success/error/warning/info API. Uses a module-level ref to bridge between the composable consumer and the ToastNotification Vue component.

nodes.name: apps.ts
nodes.summary: Application showcase configuration defining available mini-apps (Gomoku, PLAY-CS, collaborative editor, AI chat, etc.) with metadata including titles, icons, URLs, tech stacks, and markdown descriptions.

nodes.name: emojis.ts
nodes.summary: Emoji picker configuration defining categorized emoji sets (frequent, faces, gestures, animals, food, activities, travel, objects, symbols, flags) used by the chat message input component.

nodes.name: llmProviders.ts
nodes.summary: LLM provider preset configuration defining supported AI service endpoints (OpenAI, DeepSeek, GLM, Qwen, Kimi, MiMo, custom) with helper functions to retrieve provider options and presets by key.

nodes.name: aiAttachment.ts
nodes.summary: Utility module for AI chat file attachments. Provides file validation (size limits, supported types), base64/text file reading, kind detection, and pending attachment object construction for images and text files.

nodes.name: vite-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: Vite environment type declarations augmented with the ElectronAPI interface, defining the IPC bridge contract for server discovery, local server management, tray minimize, close behavior, and dialog handling.

nodes.name: auto-imports.d.ts
nodes.summary: Auto-generated type declaration file from unplugin-auto-import. Currently empty with no global type augmentations, serving as a placeholder for auto-imported composable types.

nodes.name: components.d.ts
nodes.summary: Auto-generated Vue global component type declarations from unplugin-vue-components. Registers 27 components (ChatSidebar, MessageList, GomokuBoard, CodeEditor, LoginForm, etc.) for template type checking.

nodes.name: main.cjs
nodes.summary: Electron main process entry point (built CJS bundle). Manages application window creation, system tray, embedded Spring Boot server lifecycle (JRE/JAR detection, start/stop), mDNS server discovery, IPC handlers, and close-to-tray behavior.

nodes.name: preload.js
nodes.summary: Electron preload script exposing a safe electronAPI bridge to the renderer process via contextBridge. Provides IPC invoke wrappers for server discovery, local server start/stop, window management, and close dialog handling.

nodes.name: useWebSocket
nodes.summary: Main WebSocket composable function implementing a singleton connection pattern. Returns methods for connecting/disconnecting, sending messages/files/mentions, managing rooms and invitations, and exposes reactive state refs from the chat and AI stores.

nodes.name: useEditorWebSocket
nodes.summary: Editor WebSocket composable managing collaborative editing sessions. Handles room CRUD, Yjs binary document sync over WebSocket, participant tracking, and editor state lifecycle with automatic cleanup on unmount.

nodes.name: useGomokuWebSocket
nodes.summary: Gomoku game WebSocket composable managing real-time game sessions. Handles room creation/joining, stone placement, game state synchronization, spectator mode, in-game chat, and reconnection with backoff.

nodes.name: useToast
nodes.summary: Toast notification composable providing setRef, show, success, error, warning, and info methods. Uses module-level refs to share state between the composable consumer and the ToastNotification component.

nodes.name: buildPendingAttachment
nodes.summary: Constructs a PendingAttachment object from a File, validating size limits, detecting kind (image/text), reading content as base64 or text, and generating preview URLs for images.

nodes.name: validateFile
nodes.summary: Validates a file for AI attachment: checks if it is a supported image or text type, then enforces size limits (10MB for images, 500KB for text). Returns an error string or null.

nodes.name: getProviderOptions
nodes.summary: Returns an array of provider option objects (value, label, description) derived from the LLM_PROVIDER_PRESETS map, suitable for use in select/dropdown UI components.

nodes.name: createWindow
nodes.summary: Creates the main Electron BrowserWindow with platform-specific configuration, loads the app URL or local dev server, handles window close events with minimize-to-tray behavior, and manages the close dialog flow.

nodes.name: startServer
nodes.summary: Starts the embedded Spring Boot server by locating the JRE and JAR file, spawning a child process, waiting for the port to become available, and reporting success/failure back via IPC.

nodes.name: startDiscovery
nodes.summary: Starts mDNS/DNS-SD service discovery to find LAN servers, creating a multicast UDP socket that listens for discovery responses and maintains a discovered servers list.

nodes.name: LoginForm.vue
nodes.summary: Login form component providing username-based authentication against the desktop-login API, storing user data in localStorage and emitting login events.

nodes.name: MessageList.vue
nodes.summary: Core chat message list component rendering text, file, code, and AI messages with support for streaming content, tool call states, markdown parsing, and auto-scroll.

nodes.name: MessageInput.vue
nodes.summary: Chat message input component with file upload attachments, emoji picker, @mention support, and pending attachment preview management.

nodes.name: ChatSidebar.vue
nodes.summary: Sidebar component displaying online users with avatar colors and online status indicators.

nodes.name: FileMessage.vue
nodes.summary: File message renderer supporting image inline preview, video playback, and generic file download with size formatting and type detection.

nodes.name: FilePreviewModal.vue
nodes.summary: Full-screen file preview modal supporting images, videos, PDFs, Markdown rendering, Word document conversion, and syntax-highlighted code/text files.

nodes.name: FileUploadButton.vue
nodes.summary: File upload button with click-to-pick and drag-and-drop support, file size validation (500MB limit), and directory upload rejection.

nodes.name: MentionInput.vue
nodes.summary: Rich text input component with @mention support for users, AI assistants, and @all, featuring dropdown filtering and keyboard navigation.

nodes.name: MentionNotification.vue
nodes.summary: Notification bar displaying unread @mention count with latest mention preview and mark-as-read action.

nodes.name: AvatarUpload.vue
nodes.summary: Avatar upload component with image preview, upload progress bar, size variants, and configurable default icons/colors.

nodes.name: CreateGroupDialog.vue
nodes.summary: Dialog for creating group chats with name input and multi-user participant selection from online users.

nodes.name: ConfirmDialog.vue
nodes.summary: Reusable confirmation dialog with customizable title, message, and confirm/cancel button text.

nodes.name: SetRemarkDialog.vue
nodes.summary: Dialog for setting private user remark names, with initial value loading and save/cancel actions.

nodes.name: AssistantPicker.vue
nodes.summary: Picker dialog for adding AI assistants to group chats, with tabs for 'my' and 'public' assistants and filtering by already-in-room status.

nodes.name: AssistantBadge.vue
nodes.summary: Minimal badge component displaying an 'AI' label with theme-aware styling.

nodes.name: CreateAiDialog.vue
nodes.summary: Complex dialog for creating and editing AI assistants with avatar upload, name, system prompt, LLM provider/model selection, temperature control, and public/private visibility.

nodes.name: AiAttachmentChip.vue
nodes.summary: Compact chip component displaying a pending AI attachment with file icon, name, size, and optional remove button.

nodes.name: AiAttachmentPreview.vue
nodes.summary: Preview component for AI message attachments supporting inline image display with lightbox and expandable text file previews.

nodes.name: CodeBlock.vue
nodes.summary: Syntax-highlighted code block component with language auto-detection, line numbers, and one-click copy functionality.

nodes.name: CodeEditor.vue
nodes.summary: Collaborative code editor built on CodeMirror 6 with Yjs CRDT synchronization, supporting HTML/CSS/JS languages with real-time multi-user editing.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses CodeMirror 6 with Yjs for real-time collaborative editing via CRDT conflict resolution.

nodes.name: LivePreview.vue
nodes.summary: Sandboxed iframe-based live preview component that renders HTML/CSS/JS content with debounced updates.

nodes.name: GomokuBoard.vue
nodes.summary: Canvas-based 15x15 Gomoku (Five-in-a-Row) game board with piece rendering, hover preview, win line highlighting, and responsive sizing via ResizeObserver.

nodes.name: GomokuChat.vue
nodes.summary: In-game chat component for Gomoku rooms with role-labeled messages (black/white/spectator) and auto-scroll.

nodes.name: AppDetailModal.vue
nodes.summary: Modal dialog displaying app details with Markdown description rendering, screenshots grid, and action buttons for opening app URLs.

nodes.name: ToastNotification.vue
nodes.summary: Global toast notification component with success/error/warning/info types, auto-dismiss timing, and slide animation.

nodes.name: CloseDialog.vue
nodes.summary: Electron-specific close confirmation dialog offering minimize-to-tray or quit options with a 'remember choice' checkbox, communicating via electronAPI bridge.

nodes.name: HomePage.vue
nodes.summary: Main application page orchestrating the full chat experience: WebSocket connection, room management, private/group chat, file upload, AI assistant integration, user remarks, mentions, and theme switching. The largest component in the project at ~2980 lines.

nodes.name: ChatPage.vue
nodes.summary: Chat room page composing MessageList, MessageInput, ChatSidebar, FilePreviewModal, and MentionNotification with file drag-and-drop upload and room message filtering.

nodes.name: ServerSelectPage.vue
nodes.summary: Server selection page with local network server discovery, manual IP:port connection, and Electron auto-start local server with health check fallback.

nodes.name: AppsPage.vue
nodes.summary: Application center page fetching and displaying available apps from the server API with local config fallback and app detail modal integration.

nodes.name: GomokuLobbyPage.vue
nodes.summary: Unified lobby page for Gomoku game rooms and collaborative editor rooms, with room creation (password-protected), room list display, and WebSocket connection management for both services.

nodes.name: GomokuGamePage.vue
nodes.summary: Gomoku game page integrating the game board, in-game chat, turn timer, surrender/restart controls, and spectator mode with WebSocket-based real-time gameplay.

nodes.name: EditorPage.vue
nodes.summary: Collaborative code editor page with HTML/CSS/JS tabs, Yjs-based real-time sync via WebSocket, live preview panel, and participant display.

nodes.name: AiChatView.vue
nodes.summary: AI assistant chat page with conversation management, context size control, file attachment support, streaming responses, and conversation history sidebar.

nodes.name: AiManagePage.vue
nodes.summary: AI assistant management page listing system and user-created assistants with create, edit, delete, and chat navigation actions.

nodes.name: LandingPage.vue
nodes.summary: Marketing landing page with typing animation hero, scroll-triggered feature sections, particle effects, parallax mouse tracking, and call-to-action buttons.

layers.name: API Layer
layers.description: REST controllers handling HTTP endpoints (user auth, room management, file upload, AI assistant CRUD) and frontend API client modules for server communication and service discovery

layers.name: Service Layer
layers.description: Core business logic services for chat messaging, AI conversation with tool calling and streaming, Gomoku game management, collaborative editing, file upload, user management, and LAN service discovery

layers.name: Data Layer
layers.description: JPA entity definitions for users, chat rooms, messages, AI assistants, file records, and mentions; Spring Data repositories providing persistence queries; value objects for API response DTOs

layers.name: Middleware Layer
layers.description: JWT authentication interceptors for HTTP and WebSocket connections, global exception handling for business errors and banned user enforcement

layers.name: Utility Layer
layers.description: Shared backend utility classes for JWT token generation and parsing, SHA-256 content-hash file deduplication, and Snowflake distributed ID generation

layers.name: UI Layer
layers.description: Vue 3 frontend UI including reusable components (chat messages, file upload, Gomoku board, AI assistant dialogs, collaborative editor) and page-level views (home, chat, server selection, AI management, game lobby); plus application entry points and global styles

layers.name: State and Config Layer
layers.description: Frontend state management via Pinia stores (chat, AI assistant), Vue composables for WebSocket connections (chat, editor, Gomoku) and toast notifications, and application configuration constants (apps, emojis, LLM providers, AI attachments)

layers.name: Configuration Layer
layers.description: Project build and runtime configuration including Maven POM, Spring Boot application properties, app discovery metadata, Vite/Tailwind/PostCSS configs, TypeScript configs, and Electron builder settings

layers.name: Infrastructure Layer
layers.description: Electron desktop application shell with process management, window management, LAN server discovery, and preload script; plus auto-generated type declarations and compiled Electron output bundles

tour.title: Frontend Entry Point
tour.description: main.ts 是整个前端应用的启动文件。它创建 Vue 应用实例，安装 Pinia 状态管理和 Vue Router，同时配置 Axios 的 JWT 请求拦截器和 401/403 响应拦截器。这是理解项目前端架构的起点——所有后续的页面、组件、状态和 API 调用都从这里开始。
tour.languageLesson: Vue 3 的 createApp() 采用函数式 API，与 Vue 2 的 new Vue() 不同。通过 app.use() 链式安装插件（Pinia、Router），每个插件通过 install 方法注入全局能力。

tour.title: App Shell and Routing
tour.description: App.vue 是根组件，渲染路由视图和全局 UI 层（Toast 通知、关闭对话框）。router/index.ts 定义了整个应用的页面地图：服务器选择、登录、聊天主页、应用中心、五子棋、协作编辑器、AI 助手——所有页面均采用懒加载以优化首屏性能。这两张文件共同构成了应用的骨架。
tour.languageLesson: Vue Router 的路由懒加载使用动态 import() 语法，Webpack/Vite 会自动将每个路由组件分割为独立的 chunk，只有访问该路由时才加载对应的 JS 文件。

tour.title: State Management with Pinia
tour.description: chat.ts 和 ai.ts 是两个核心 Pinia Store，分别管理聊天和 AI 助手的全局状态。chat.ts 维护消息列表、房间数据、在线用户等聊天状态；ai.ts 管理 AI 助手列表、对话历史和消息记录。它们是前后端之间的状态桥梁——WebSocket 收到的消息写入 Store，UI 组件从 Store 读取并响应式渲染。
tour.languageLesson: Pinia 是 Vue 3 推荐的状态管理库，替代了 Vuex。每个 Store 通过 defineStore 定义，支持 Composition API 风格（setup 函数）和 Options API 风格。与 Vuex 不同，Pinia 没有 mutations，直接通过 actions 修改 state。

tour.title: WebSocket Communication Layer
tour.description: useWebSocket.ts 是整个实时通信的核心 composable，实现单例 WebSocket 连接管理——自动重连、心跳检测、消息路由。server-config.ts 提供动态 URL 构建，支持 Web 模式（相对路径）和桌面模式（绝对地址）双模切换。所有实时功能（聊天、五子棋、协作编辑）都建立在这套通信基础之上。
tour.languageLesson: Vue 3 的 Composables 是以 use 前缀命名的函数，封装可复用的有状态逻辑。与 React Hooks 类似，它们利用闭包和响应式系统实现状态共享。useWebSocket 的单例模式确保整个应用只维护一条 WebSocket 连接。

tour.title: Chat UI: Page and Components
tour.description: HomePage.vue 是聊天主页面（fan-out 达到 25，是全项目依赖最广的组件），负责 WebSocket 连接、房间切换、消息收发的全局协调。ChatPage.vue 组合了 MessageList、MessageInput、ChatSidebar 等子组件，构建出完整的聊天界面。这些页面和组件是用户直接交互的界面，也是理解功能如何落地的最佳入口。

tour.title: Backend Entry and Configuration
tour.description: ChatApplication.java 是 Spring Boot 应用入口，启动时自动创建 data 目录并记录所有 API 端点。WebSocketConfig.java 注册了三个 WebSocket 端点（/ws/chat、/ws/gomoku、/ws/editor），每个端点都配置了 JWT 认证拦截器。application.properties 定义了服务器端口（8081）、SQLite 数据库路径、JWT 密钥和 AI 模型配置。这三张文件揭示了后端的整体架构：一个嵌入式 Java 服务器，同时承载 REST API 和多个 WebSocket 服务。

tour.title: Authentication and Security
tour.description: JwtUtil.java 负责 JWT Token 的生成和解析，使用 HMAC-SHA 签名。JwtAuthInterceptor.java 拦截所有 /api/** 请求验证 Token，排除了注册、登录等公开接口。WebSocketAuthInterceptor.java 在 WebSocket 握手阶段从 URI 参数中提取 Token 进行认证。这套双层认证机制确保了 HTTP 和 WebSocket 两种通信方式的安全性。

tour.title: Core Chat WebSocket Handler
tour.description: ChatWebSocketHandler.java 是整个系统的核心事件路由器（fan-out 达到 11），处理用户加入、消息收发、房间管理、AI 对话、@提及、智能体群聊回复等 30+ 种事件类型。它将前端的 WebSocket 消息分发到 MessageService、RoomService、AiChatService 等业务服务，是连接前端 UI 和后端逻辑的枢纽。理解这个文件就理解了整个聊天系统的事件流。

tour.title: Data Model Layer
tour.description: Message.java、Room.java、User.java 是三个核心 JPA 实体，定义了聊天系统的数据模型。Message 支持文本、文件和系统消息类型，通过序列号保证顺序；Room 区分公开群聊和私聊房间；User 存储用户信息和 Token 版本。这些实体直接映射到 SQLite 数据库表，是上层服务和控制器的数据基础。
tour.languageLesson: JPA（Java Persistence API）通过注解将 Java 对象映射到数据库表。@Entity 声明实体类，@Id 定义主键，@Column 映射字段。Hibernate 作为 JPA 实现，自动生成 SQL 建表语句并处理 CRUD 操作。

tour.title: Business Service Layer
tour.description: MessageService.java 管理消息的发送、序列号生成和历史查询；RoomService.java 处理房间的创建、成员管理和私聊显示名解析；AiChatService.java 实现了完整的 AI 聊天功能，包括流式对话、工具调用（web_search/web_fetch）和多模态附件支持。这三个服务覆盖了平台的核心业务逻辑：即时通讯、房间管理和 AI 助手。

tour.title: REST API Controllers
tour.description: AuthController.java 处理桌面端的用户名登录认证并生成 JWT；RoomController.java 提供房间的完整生命周期管理（创建、加入、退出、解散）；FileController.java 处理文件上传，包含多层安全校验。这些 REST 控制器与 WebSocket 处理器互补——REST 负责资源管理类操作，WebSocket 负责实时通信。

tour.title: Multiplayer Games and Collaborative Editing
tour.description: GomokuWebSocketHandler.java 管理五子棋游戏的房间创建、观战、落子和胜负判定，GomokuGameService.java 实现 15x15 棋盘的核心逻辑。EditorWebSocketHandler.java 基于 Yjs 实现协作编辑器的文档房间管理和实时同步转发。这两个功能展示了平台的扩展能力——同一套 WebSocket 基础设施支撑了聊天之外的多样化实时交互场景。

tour.title: Electron Desktop Shell
tour.description: electron/main.ts 是 Electron 主进程入口，初始化窗口和系统托盘，启动局域网服务发现。process-manager.ts 管理本地 Spring Boot JAR 进程的生命周期（启动/停止/日志）。discovery.ts 通过 UDP 多播发现局域网内的服务器实例。这三个模块将 Vue Web 应用包装成一个完整的桌面客户端，实现了嵌入式后端进程管理和局域网自动发现能力。
tour.languageLesson: Electron 架构分为主进程（Node.js 环境，管理窗口和系统资源）和渲染进程（Chromium 环境，运行 Web 应用）。两者通过 IPC（进程间通信）交互。preload 脚本通过 contextBridge 安全地暴露 API，避免渲染进程直接访问 Node.js 能力。

tour.title: Build and Packaging Configuration
tour.description: pom.xml 定义了后端的 Maven 构建配置，基于 Spring Boot 3.2.3，集成 WebSocket、JPA、SQLite、Caffeine 缓存和 Spring AI。package.json 管理前端依赖（Vue 3、Pinia、CodeMirror、Yjs）和 Electron 构建脚本。electron-builder.yml 配置将后端 JAR 作为额外资源打包进桌面应用，生成 Windows NSIS 安装程序。这三张文件揭示了项目的完整构建链：Maven 构建后端、Vite 构建前端、Electron Builder 打包桌面应用。
tour.languageLesson: Maven 的 pom.xml 通过 <parent> 继承 Spring Boot Starter Parent，自动管理依赖版本。BOM（Bill of Materials）如 spring-ai-bom 统一管理一组相关依赖的版本。electron-builder 支持 extraResources 配置，可将非 JS 文件（如 JAR）打包进应用资源目录。
